CREATE TABLE sales (id UInt32, amount Float32, category String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, amount, category, SUM(amount) OVER (PARTITION BY category ORDER BY id) AS category_sum FROM sales QUALIFY category_sum > 200;
SELECT id, amount, category, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY category ORDER BY amount DESC) AS rank FROM sales QUALIFY rank = 1;
CREATE TABLE employees (id UInt32, salary Float32, department String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, salary, department, AVG(salary) OVER (PARTITION BY department) AS avg_salary FROM employees QUALIFY salary > avg_salary;
SELECT e.id, e.salary, e.department, DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY e.salary DESC) AS salary_rank FROM employees e QUALIFY salary_rank <= 2;
CREATE TABLE orders (id UInt32, amount Float32, customer_id UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT o.id, o.amount, o.customer_id, SUM(o.amount) OVER (PARTITION BY o.customer_id) AS total_amount FROM orders o QUALIFY total_amount > 300;
SELECT e.id, e.salary, e.department, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY e.department) AS dept_count FROM employees e QUALIFY dept_count > 1;
